CurrentIssues.ID: MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$if (basal.any { it.value < 0 }) throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("Basal values cannot be negative")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$if (basal.isEmpty()) throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("Profile must have at least one basal segment")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$if (icr.any { it.value < 0 }) throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("ICR values cannot be negative")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$if (isf.any { it.value < 0 }) throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("ISF values cannot be negative")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$if (targets.any { it.low < 0 || it.high < 0 }) throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("Target values cannot be negative")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("ISF value too low for mg/dL (suspected mmol/L)")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("Target value too low for mg/dL (suspected mmol/L)")
MaxLineLength:Profile.kt$Profile$throw org.javafreedom.kdiab.profiles.domain.exception.BusinessValidationException("Value too high for mmol/L (suspected mg/dL)")
